policy.archive_policy: Tracked archive Python entrypoints and tracked archive shell scripts are guarded, but source archives remain evidence, not supported execution APIs.
policy.manual_shell_boundary: Arbitrary user shell commands such as Get-Content hugefile or python -c print(...) are outside repo-defined runner control.
policy.new_python_entrypoint_gate: certify.py audit fails when a new active __main__ file lacks the bootstrap or its directory lacks sitecustomize.py.
policy.non_python_policy: Active non-Python scripts are allowlisted and must redirect high-volume external tool output to files.
policy.powershell_policy: Only explicitly reviewed active PowerShell scripts are allowed; future active .ps1 files fail the token-burn audit until added to the reviewed allowlist or wrapped.
policy.python_entrypoint_requirement: Every active direct Python entrypoint must import the token-burn guard bootstrap marker.
